nasb.text: “Tell Aaron and his sons to be careful with the holy gifts of the sons of Israel, which they dedicate to Me, so as not to profane My holy name; I am the Lord.

esv.text: “Speak to Aaron and his sons so that they abstain from the holy things of the people of Israel, which they dedicate to me, so that they do not profane my holy name: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: “你要告訴亞倫和他的兒子，叫他們謹慎處理以色列人分別為聖歸給我的聖物，免得他們褻瀆我的聖名；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: “你告诉亚伦父子们要谨慎处理以色列人献给我的圣物，免得亵渎我的圣名。我是耶和华。
